title: 委員たちの井戸端会議

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In the interest of promoting amity between the
academy's various committees, it has been
suggested that we hold a competitive relay race.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What's unique about this relay is that the batons
carried by the runners will be replaced with items
related to each committee.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Umm... So, for example, you mean the library
committee members might run with a book?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's right. What about the other committees?
Do you have any ideas about what you could use
for a baton?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I suppose the health committee could use a
thermometer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Maybe the groundskeeping committee could use
a dust cloth? Oh, but a broom would work nicely
too!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hm, then perhaps a laptop would be suitable for
the general affairs committee.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
What?! A-are you sure about that? Wouldn't it be
really bad if you dropped it?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I envisioned that a mishap like that could occur,
so I plan to use a model that can withstand drops
from heights of up to ten meters.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
W-wow! I didn't know there were laptops that
durable!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The disciplinary committee will use a bamboo
sword! A pure, honorable sword that will subdue
any who dare to disturb the peace.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
However, I worry that sprinting around while
brandishing a sword could itself be easily
misconstrued as an act that disturbs the peace...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! ...Geez, if that's the case, then what else
can we use for the baton?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, let's not worry. We can all think of
something together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While passing through the central plaza, I spot
Symboli Rudolf and others discussing potential
baton candidates.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
What kind of work does the disciplinary
committee usually do?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We keep a watchful eye on Golshi to make sure
she doesn't do anything weird!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The gratitude I harbor for your service cannot be
expressed in words.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We also greet students when they arrive in the
morning, warn them about violating the dress
code, and patrol the academy in case anyone
breaks curfew!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That all sounds very important, but I'm not sure
any of those duties involve anything especially
baton-like.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, we also make any student who breaks
academy rules write up an apology statement!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
What if the disciplinary committee members carry
an apology statement as they run?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Whoa, whoa! Wouldn't that make it seem like we did something bad?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
How about if we write "THIS ISN'T AN APOLOGY
STATEMENT" in really big letters?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's just gonna make it look even more
suspicious! It'll seem like we're making excuses!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I think we need some fresh ideas. In which
case...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What about you? What do you think would serve
as a suitable baton to symbolize the disciplinary
committee?
choice_data_list:
What if you have Gold Ship run alongside
them?

Let's use their "conviction" to discipline as the
baton!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We wouldn't even have something to hold! And
who knows if Golshi would actually show up!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Yes, it is Golshi we're talking about...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, she's certainly not one to be tied down by
obligations.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
She always does something completely different
from what we expect!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It'd be great if we all put our heads together and
come up with a way to stop her from doing that!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: That could very well be an insurmountable task...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The topic of how to curb Gold Ship's behavior
gradually shifts to the forefront of the discussion,
and the baton issue is left by the wayside.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Conviction?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ooooh! I see what you're getting at! Our members
all have that same conviction lying deep in our
hearts!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But will onlookers be able to tell whether you've
passed that to the next runner?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We could write "conviction" on some cardboard
and use that as the baton!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second! Plain old cardboard doesn't
convey the conviction of the disciplinary
committee!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... If cardboard's no good, what about washi
paper?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the discussion about how to convert the
concept of "conviction" into a baton continues.
